emit_not_contains: declare function __svn_component_default(__anchor: any, props: any): any;
_note: +layout.svelte with only a children destructure. Emit synthesizes `{ children: Snippet }` (REQUIRED, no `?`) as the Props shape — SvelteKit always passes a children snippet to layouts at runtime. The original assertion (Gap F regression, 2026-04-27) used `children?:`, which forced user code to write `{@render children?.()}` instead of `{@render children()}` and fired TS2722 'Cannot invoke an object which is possibly undefined.' on the bare call. Mirrors upstream svelte2tsx synthesis.
